design.notes: Rebuilt index.html to match the Phase 1D approved spec: dark navy theme (#0F131C/#171D29/#6C63FF etc.), sticky top nav (Summary/Daily/Weekly/Channels/Funnel/Adnoc/Actions), Chart.js bar charts for Yesterday-vs-PrevDay, Week-vs-Week, Overall Funnel, and Adnoc Funnel, collapsed 'View calculation details' sections for weekly and funnel breakdowns, and abbreviated KPI numbers (e.g. 8.8K, AED 142K). This is now the locked approved design — recurring runs must only update data/values, not redesign. Do not revert to the old light theme.

slack_recipients.name: GA4 Reporting - Motor UAE
slack_recipients.rule: STAKEHOLDER-facing. Send only positive/neutral highlights: key metrics, wins, and the report link. Never mention data issues, corrections, bugs, discrepancies, or methodology caveats here.

slack_recipients.name: #digital-marketing-team-firsttech
slack_recipients.rule: INTERNAL working channel. Send data-quality issues, corrections, methodology notes, and anything flagged as a problem or caveat here instead of the stakeholder group DM. Can also receive the same highlights as the stakeholder group if relevant.

notifications.rule: Per explicit user instructions on 2026-07-17: (1) Do NOT DM Pramish Yadav (U09PSG5V9D3) individually anymore. (2) Send positive/results-only highlights to the group DM 'GA4 Reporting - Motor UAE' (C0A8NFZSB0W) — this is a stakeholder-facing group, keep it clean, no issues/corrections/methodology language. (3) Send any data-quality issues, corrections, or caveats to #digital-marketing-team-firsttech (C0A9JR1NESX) instead — this is the internal working channel for that kind of content.

data_quality_notes.purchases_correction_2026_07_17: On 2026-07-17 discovered that the 'purchases' metric had been sourced from the GA4 Funnel exploration's last step (Purchase), which undercounts by roughly half vs the true 'purchase' ecommerce event (GA4 also fires an unrelated, non-revenue 'Purchase' capitalized event that must be excluded). Revenue figures were confirmed correct throughout — only the purchase count was wrong. All daily files 2026-07-06 through 2026-07-16 were corrected using the true lowercase 'purchase' event count. Adnoc-segment purchase counts are still under review for the same issue. Per the notifications rule above, this kind of note goes to #digital-marketing-team-firsttech, never to the stakeholder group DM.
